{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tew labbi tsdohfees/ 
kad tu turreſi un darrift tohs Lik- 
kumns un Teefas/ ko tas KUNGS 
Mohſum pahr Ifraëlu pawehlejs. 
Neimnees drohſchu Sirdi/ un 
turrajs labbu Prahtu/ ne bih- 
stees/ un ne bailojees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un reds/ es etmu eekſch 
mannahm Behdahm preeſch ta 
KUNGA Namma faſrahjis/ 
fimts tuhkſtoſchus Talentus 
Selta/ un tuhkſtoſch Reiſi tuhk- 
ſtoſchus Talentus Sudraba/ ir 
Warra un Dſelses tik dauds ka 
ſkaitiht ne warr/ jo tas irr fohti 
dauds/ ir Kehkus un Akmiſkus 
eſmu es faſrahjts/ tu warr wehl 
wairak fadohmaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir pee tew irr leeſs Pułks 
Strahdnecku/ Akmiſu Zirteju 
un Remmetehu/ pee Akmiſeem 
nn Kohkeem/ un us wiſſadu 
Darbu iſmahziti Landis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Selta/ Sudraba/ un 
Warra/ un Dſelses irr weens ne 
teſkaitams Pułks. Zellees/ un 
darri to/ un lai tas KUNGS 
ar tewim irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids pawehſeja 
arridsan wiſſeem Ifraëta Lee 
leen Kungeem/ ka tee winnaDeh- 
laut Salamanam palihdsetu (un 
fazzija:)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi tas KUNG S 
juhſu Deews irr ar jums/ 
un irr jums Duﬀeteham de- 
wis wiſſapkahtt? jo wiꞥſch irr 
tahs Semmes Cedſhwotajns
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad dohdeetees nu ar fa- 
wu Sirdi/ un ar fawu Dweh- 
felt to KUNGU fawn Deewu 
mekleht/ un zelleetees/ un uſtat- 
sajt Deewa ta KUNGA fivehtu 
Weetu/ ka ta KUNGA Derri- 
bas Schkirſts/ un tee twehti Dee- 
wa Rihi ſchaſ Namma ueſti 
tohp/ kas ta KUNGA Wahr- 
dam taps uſtaisſhts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta darrija Dahwids fawu 
Dehlu Salamanu par Kehninu 
pahr Ifraëlu/ kad wiꞥſch wezz 
bija un fawu Laiku peedſthwojs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N (Dahwids) fapul- 
zeja wiſſus Ifraëta Lee- 
lus Kungus/ un Pree- 
ſterns/ un Lewitus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Lewiti tappe ſkaiti- 
ti/ kas trihsdefnuts un waira 
Saddus wezzi bija/ nn winn 
Pułks pehz winnu Galwahn 
kas ſipri Wihti/ bija trihsde- 
mits un aston tuhkſtoſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No teem paſcheem bija d 
wideſnuts un tſchetr tuhkſtoſch 
kas to Darbu pee ta KUNG 
Namnu dfinue/ un feſch tuh- 
ſtoſchi Uſrangi un Teefatajt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tſchetr tuhkſtoſc
"
    }
  ],
